human_task_name: SynAIpse CC2 exact admitted patch Worker review
objective: Review the exact admitted CC2 source patch without editing source or Git, and determine whether the versioned context-failure envelope, producer-reader compatibility, and decision semantics satisfy the declared CC0/CC2 contract.

decision_frame.value: Establish fresh Worker evidence for the exact recovered staged patch before independent disproof review.
decision_frame.why_now: The original staged candidate was preserved in a worktree index and has now been reconstructed byte-for-byte, including the hook-admitted duplicate documentation line.
acceptance_criteria: HEAD remains 8aa5e406f49c84ba04fa39e628d9d8f5a3ea35c8 and the staged patch digest remains 1d4ed517e6cdf2cdee3065c812049cfa91befc60d3e172dbbb3442aed4665afe.
Review the public schema, canonical producer, parser, semantic validator, decision stop semantics, and legacy reader compatibility.
Run the focused source and contract gates without changing source or Git state.
Return accepted only when no reproducible source or contract defect remains; otherwise return rejected with assertion-shaped findings.
dependencies: Exact staged patch recovered from the preserved CC2 QA worktree index; the reconstruction command and digest are recorded in the PM handoff.
decision_frame.risk_or_learning_target: Prevent a stale or substituted CC2 patch from being represented as the admitted source candidate.
decision_frame.smallest_increment: One read-only Worker review against the exact target and staged patch pair.

review_plan.adversarial_review_rationale: CC2 changes a public versioned failure envelope and compatibility readers, so independent disproof and adversarial review are required before any source commit.

non_goals: Do not edit source, tests, contracts, packets, or existing evidence.
Do not stage, commit, push, create or update a PR, mutate hosted state, or clean any worktree.
Do not claim QA Disproof, Adversarial Review, fan-in, hosted checks, acceptance, merge, release, or production readiness.

validation_entrypoints: pnpm exec vitest run src/lib/synaipse/context-contract.test.ts src/lib/synaipse/context-plane.test.ts src/lib/decision/harness-decision.test.ts src/commands/next.test.ts --maxWorkers=1 --reporter=dot

delegated_decision_rights: Run read-only review commands and write only the declared Worker artifacts.
